arts.sum: David Beckham’s career contained a catalogue of defining moments. From an early emergence as part of Fergie’s Fledglings at Manchester United, to treble success with the club in the late nineties and a Galactico move to Spain in the new millennium. arts.ttl: England vs Greece: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Fotis Ioannidis is Greece's regular starting striker and scored three goals in the two games against the Republic of Ireland and Finland but he's not expected to feature against England due to an adductor injury. England's Nations League campaign continues on Thursday night as they aim to take top spot in Group 2 of League B off upcoming opponents Greece.

arts.ttl: Southgate gives ‘for sure’ response to Ten Hag rumours
arts.sum: Southgate is certainly not exerting pressure on Man Utd’s ownership group and speaking at the European Club Association (ECA) General Assembly in Athens, he refuted claims that he is ready to jump at the chance of managing the Old Trafford side. Manchester United have been heavily linked with a move for former England manager Gareth Southgate, who has broken his silence of the prospect of replacing Erik ten Hag in the Old Trafford dugout.
